sizing_rule.note: Rule establishes foundational principle that optimal position sizing must be derived from positive expectation and risk of ruin tolerance, not fixed reinvestment. Exact formula (optimal f calculation) pending in subsequent chapters. Indicates Vince's fractional optimal f method without numerical parameter.

source_rule_text: Do not reinvest 100% of your stake on all occasions; determine optimal reinvestment percentage based on positive mathematical expectation to avoid excessive risk.
